description: Source-attributed public Signals tracking AI and AGI intelligence.

items.content_text: A June 2026 research paper uses Codex usage data as evidence that agentic AI is moving from developer tooling toward broader organizational workflows.
items.summary: A June 2026 research paper uses Codex usage data as evidence that agentic AI is moving from developer tooling toward broader organizational workflows.
items.title: Agentic AI adoption accelerates from Codex usage evidence

items.content_text: The 2025 AI Agent Index documents technical and safety features across deployed agentic AI systems and flags uneven transparency among developers.
items.summary: The 2025 AI Agent Index documents technical and safety features across deployed agentic AI systems and flags uneven transparency among developers.
items.title: AI Agent Index highlights transparency gaps in deployed agents

items.content_text: The European AI Office supports AI Act implementation, especially general-purpose AI rules, evaluations, guidance, and enforcement workflows.
items.summary: The European AI Office supports AI Act implementation, especially general-purpose AI rules, evaluations, guidance, and enforcement workflows.
items.title: EU AI Office becomes the GPAI governance surface to watch

items.content_text: METR tracks frontier AI progress through task-completion time horizons, measuring the length of tasks AI agents can complete at defined success rates.
items.summary: METR tracks frontier AI progress through task-completion time horizons, measuring the length of tasks AI agents can complete at defined success rates.
items.title: METR time-horizon work reframes autonomous capability tracking

items.content_text: NIST frames AI governance around measurement, risk management, standards, guidelines, benchmarks, and evaluations.
items.summary: NIST frames AI governance around measurement, risk management, standards, guidelines, benchmarks, and evaluations.
items.title: NIST AI governance is anchored in standards
